untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ADF (Augmented Dickey-Fuller) test and Ornstein-Uhlenbeck lambda (λ) parameter estimation, which are statistical tests not available in the allowed indicator set. These require time-series stationarity testing and mean-reversion half-life calculations that cannot be expressed using only the provided technical indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, and price position). The signal also lacks specific exit conditions (marked AUTHOR_SILENT) and entry threshold parameters (lookback_period, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period all marked AUTHOR_SILENT).
translation_notes: This is a statistical mean-reversion strategy requiring econometric analysis (ADF test, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process fitting) that cannot be translated to technical indicators. A practical approximation would require implementing custom mean-reversion detection (e.g., via Hurst exponent, half-life calculation, or cointegration tests) outside the scope of standard technical analysis indicators.
